# List all declarations.
exec gorelo ls
stdout 'server\.go'
stdout 'type.*Server'
stdout 'func.*NewServer'
stdout 'method.*Server\.Start'

# JSON output.
exec gorelo ls --json
stdout '"kind": "type"'
stdout '"name": "Server"'

# Filter by specifier.
exec gorelo ls Server
stdout 'type.*Server'
stdout 'method.*Server\.Start'
! stdout 'NewServer'

-- go.mod --
module example.com/test

go 1.21
-- server.go --
package main

// Server handles requests.
type Server struct {
	Name string
}

// Start begins serving.
func (s *Server) Start() {}

// NewServer creates a Server.
func NewServer() *Server { return &Server{} }
